info.hindI_arTa: AliMgana karanA gale lagAnA cipake rahanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SlizyatyAliNgane dAhe Slezate Rici Slezayet ' (Slo. 175) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: viDuraM tu praviSleza ityamaraH vyatirikto'tra praSabdaH
'yaTA CAyAtapO nityaM susambadDO parasparam evaM karma ca kartA ca saMSlizwAvitaretaram' (paYcata0 2127)..
'SarabanDA viSiSlizuH' (Bawwi0 1467) viSlizwA baBUvuH sopasargakopi SlizirihAkarmakaH prayukto vEyAkaraRena kavinA tadidaM gatyarTAkarmakaSlizetisUtravfttyA viruDyate
'mA tad BUmyAmASlizanmA tfRezu' (f0 116211) mA''Slizat mA saMlagnaM BUt
'tA praRijya niSlezayet' (Sa0 brA0 25215) saMsaktAH kuryAt ityAha
'mAse hyatIte yo'nantaro divasaH sa mAsaM pratyupaSlizwo Bavati' (pA0 2143 sUtre nyAse) mAsaM pratyupaSlizwaH=mAsena saMsaktaH
'tadupaSlezaya SaraM yAvannirUpayAmi' (vikrama0 5) upaSlezaya upanaya madantikaM nayetyarTaH
'ekAdaSa kArzApaRA upaSlizwA asmiYCate ekAdaSaM Satam' (pA0 5245 sUtre BAzye) upaSlizwA yuktAH
'taTEvADvanyavezeRa sopaSlizya janArdanam pratyagravanamAlena vakzasA'BivirAjatA' (hari0 24656) upaSlizya pariSlizya ASlizya
